query: Tell Me about How AI Affects the Software Market.

sources.title: The future of software in the age of AI - Deloitte US
sources.snippet: Early adopters of AI in the software industry are gaining significant market capitalization in a competitive landscape. Software configuration is being made more intuitive and dynamic with AI , shifting revenue capture from system integrators to software companies.
sources.content: Early adopters of AI in the software industry are gaining significant market capitalization in a competitive landscape. Software configuration is being made more intuitive and dynamic with AI , shifting revenue capture from system integrators to software companies.

sources.title: AI is Transforming the Market and the Future of Software Development
sources.snippet: But is AI altering the landscape as dramatically as claimed? In this article, we'll explore whether AI is truly changing the market , trace its origins, examine the companies leading the AI revolution, and dive into how AI impacts software development today.
sources.content: But is AI altering the landscape as dramatically as claimed? In this article, we'll explore whether AI is truly changing the market , trace its origins, examine the companies leading the AI revolution, and dive into how AI impacts software development today.

sources.title: The Future of AI in Software Development - The JetBrains Blog
sources.snippet: We've looked at current AI trends shaping software development and explored two vastly different AI -driven scenarios. Regardless of what the future holds, one thing is clear: AI will evolve from a supportive assistant into a proactive player in coding, testing, and analysis.
sources.content: We've looked at current AI trends shaping software development and explored two vastly different AI -driven scenarios. Regardless of what the future holds, one thing is clear: AI will evolve from a supportive assistant into a proactive player in coding, testing, and analysis.

sources.title: Leading AI-driven software organizations show the way | McKinsey
sources.snippet: This article examines two key shifts and three essential enablers that high-performing software organizations use to maximize the potential of incorporating AI into software development.
sources.content: This article examines two key shifts and three essential enablers that high-performing software organizations use to maximize the potential of incorporating AI into software development.

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Software Market Share, Size, Trends ...
sources.snippet: Artificial intelligence ( AI ) software refers to computer programs and algorithms capable of learning from data, recognizing patterns, making decisions, and solving problems autonomously or with minimal human intervention, designed to simulate and perform tasks that require human intelligence.
sources.content: Artificial intelligence ( AI ) software refers to computer programs and algorithms capable of learning from data, recognizing patterns, making decisions, and solving problems autonomously or with minimal human intervention, designed to simulate and perform tasks that require human intelligence.
